name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 27 Sep 2022
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this release, we are introducing a new input parameter in the GET/delivered_report method to replace an existing parameter."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"For more details, read on!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"ENHANCEMENT","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"New Input Parameter in GET /delivered_report Method for Campaign APIs","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"A new parameter "},{"text":"per_page","bold":true},{"text":" has been introduced in GET/delivered_report method for the Campaign APIs. This new parameter is replacing the parameter "},{"text":"per","bold":true},{"text":" that was"},{"text":" ","bold":true},{"text":"being"},{"text":" ","bold":true},{"text":"used to set the number of records per page in this method."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The "},{"text":"per_page","bold":true},{"text":" parameter enables you to set the number of records that are included in each result page. The parameter accepts a minimum of 200 records per page and a maximum of 5000 records per page. The default value for the parameter is 200."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Why is the Change Needed?","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"While the "},{"text":"per","bold":true},{"text":" parameter is used in all Marketing Cloud REST APIs, it was causing duplicated records to be returned in case of the GET /delivered_report method. So, when you used the "},{"text":"per","bold":true},{"text":" parameter in this specific method, it returned 10 individual records per virtual page, irrespective of its set value."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"But the new "},{"text":"per_page","bold":true},{"text":" parameter eliminates the duplication and allows for more records per virtual page."}]},{"type":"blockquote","children":[{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":" "},{"text":"Note","bold":true},{"text":": The "},{"text":"per_page","bold":true},{"text":" parameter is available only for the GET /delivered_report API method. All other methods still accept the "},{"text":"per","bold":true},{"text":" input parameter for specifying the number of records to include per virtual page."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
